title: senecio integerrimus
intro: Senecio integerrimus, also known as entire leaf ragwort or tall ragwort, is a perennial plant native to North America, characterized by its large, entire leaves and yellow or white daisy-like flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Senecio integerrimus include treating digestive issues, reducing fever, and relieving pain, as well as its use as a diuretic to treat urinary problems. Herbal preparations of Senecio integerrimus can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions to harness its medicinal properties, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its effects.
